login.title: AI SDR Agent
login.subtitle: Sign in to your single-tenant admin panel.
login.errorNetwork: Could not reach the server. Check the API and network.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Dashboard shell. Campaigns and leads appear here in later phases.
overview.statusCardBody: JWT is stored in the browser; API requests use the prefix from NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Prompts and rules for outreach to leads.
campaigns.listDescription: Open a campaign to edit settings and upload a CSV of leads.
campaigns.empty: No campaigns yet. Create the first one.

campaignNew.title: New campaign
campaignNew.cardDescription: System prompt and rules for the first email and follow-ups.
campaignNew.name: Name

campaignDetail.editDescription: Prompts and campaign status affect future email generation.
campaignDetail.name: Name
campaignDetail.csvDescription: Columns: email (required); optional first_name / company / pain_point and synonyms (see API). Separator: comma or semicolon.
campaignDetail.importSummary: Import: created {created}, skipped (duplicates, etc.) {skipped}. Parse errors: {errors}.
campaignDetail.leadsDescription: Email is globally unique in this instance; duplicates on import are skipped.
campaignDetail.leadsEmpty: No leads yet. Upload a CSV above.
campaignDetail.confirmDeleteCampaign: Delete this campaign and all related leads? This cannot be undone.
